message:
feat: add exhaustive DevTools logging for all WASM operations

Every real WASM API call (runtimeCreate, scopeEnter, scopeClose,
taskSpawn, taskJoin, taskCancel, fetchRequest, websocket*) is now
automatically logged to the browser DevTools console with:
- Color-coded prefixes ([asupersync-wasm] in blue)
- Operation name in cyan
- Arguments summary
- Outcome (ok/err/cancelled) in green/red/orange
- Handle slot and generation for allocations
- Error code and message for failures

Additional logging:
- WASM load source (local vs CDN) with ABI version
- Runtime init with persistent handle details
- REPL executions in console.group
- Chaos test start/end with summary stats
- Benchmark results with ops/sec

Zero simulation code remains. All 21 exhibits use real WASM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
